title: Infinity Armory
description: Supercharge your Minecraft journey! OP armors, a one-hit sword, and invincible Voidwalker Armor await. Dominate effortlessly with Infinity Armory!
body:
Gear up for the ultimate Minecraft power-up with the Infinity Armory! Become nearly invincible with super-strong armors, a one-hit sword, and armor that protects you from everything but the really tricky stuff.

# Cool Stuff:

🔥 Super Armor Set: Equip the super armor set to become a Minecraft tank. Take hits like a champ and keep on going.

🪓 Super Tools Set: Use the Super Tools (Sword, Pickaxes and bows) To Dominate Any Battleground!

⚔️ One-Hit Sword: Knock out any enemy with just one swing of your super-powered sword. It's like a cheat code for battles.

💠 VoidWalker Armor Set: Wear all four pieces of the VoidWalker Armor set to laugh off all damage, except for some tricky moves like /kill.

🌌 Easy and Powerful: No complicated stuff here. Just slap on your super gear set and go wreck some mobs. It's Minecraft on easy mode, but way more fun.

**The Infinity Armory is all about keeping things simple while making you crazy strong. But remember, the real power kicks in when you wear all four pieces of the super and VoidWalker armor sets. Ready to crush it in Minecraft? This is your ticket to total domination!**

# Usage:

## _/Function <toolname>:<level>_

### Currently Available tools: 

1. Swords
2. Pickaxes
3. Bows

### Levels: 

1. lvl10
2. lvl50
3. lvl100
4. lvl200
5. lvl255

# Special Items Command Usage:

## _/Function special:<item>_

### Special Items:

1. OneHitSword
2. VoidWalker
